test_inventory.notes: No test/scenarios/ directory exists (empty category, not required by current repo layout). Domain + feature + core + wiring trees contain additional focused tests that indirectly reinforce P0 coverage (e.g. trigger_manager_test, session_controller_test).

Date Mode: disguised reminder cycle > disguised reminder with retries fires multiple grace-expired
Date Mode: disguised reminder cycle > repeatMissed emits between retries
Date Mode: disguised reminder cycle > disguised reminder triggers notification on step start

Layer 1: SessionOrchestrator simulation branch > every strategy has a non-empty simulationDescription

AppDefaults / ModeOverrides — not in property suite
StealthConfig / GpsLoggingConfig — not in property suite
DisarmTrigger (TimerDisarmTrigger / GpsArrivalDisarmTrigger) — not explicitly in property suite
N is small (5-100 depending on type), not the 200 targeted by TEST-120

AUDIT-BUG-3_phone_call_fallback.test: executeReal does NOT use hardcoded fallback number (line 78-87)

FakeCallConfig_callerName_null_coercion.test: FakeCallConfig with explicit null callerName normalizes to "Mom" (line 95-103)
FakeCallConfig_callerName_null_coercion.note: Test locks current behavior; phase-14 notes flag this as a bug where null should be preserved rather than coerced — verification team to decide true fix vs spec update.

SettingsController_async_load_race_L7.test: SessionController L7 race mitigation > startSession awaits the settings hydrate before reading mode (line 917-938)
SettingsController_async_load_race_L7.note: Tests the consumer (SessionController) awaits hydrate rather than SettingsController directly. No dedicated test/regression/settings_controller_test.dart exists.

evidence: All integration tests use FakeAudioService / FakeMessagingService / FakePhoneService / FakeNotificationService / FakeVibrationService from lib/services/fakes/
db_round_trip_test uses NativeDatabase.memory() — in-memory Drift, never touches disk
cross_feature_test uses in-memory repository subclasses + ProviderContainer overrides — never hits Drift
FixedRandom is used consistently to eliminate jitter nondeterminism (per D-TEST-1)
fake_async.fakeAsync() wraps all timer-driven tests — no wall-clock sleeps
All platform-channel dependent services are stubbed (IncomingCall, Geofence, BatteryMonitor, DeviceState, Location, HardwareButton)
concerns: Layer 2 tests in simulation_defense_test.dart instantiate real AudioService, PhoneService, VibrationService and call them with isSimulation:true. They expect short-circuit behavior; if the real impl ever tries to resolve a MethodChannel before the short-circuit check, these tests could fail with MissingPluginException on CI. Current impl short-circuits before channel access, so the approach is acceptable, but the test contract is fragile and deserves a comment.

findings.issue: No test/regression/settings_controller_test.dart directly exercises the SettingsController L7 race (OnboardingScreen.completeOnboarding persisting empty defaults over seeded state per D-CONTROLLER-1).
findings.suggested_fix: Add a regression test that spawns SettingsController, invokes a mutator before `build().future` resolves, and asserts the seeded AppDefaults survive (not overwritten by const AppSettings()).

findings.issue: FakeCallConfig null-callerName coercion test ASSERTS the coercion to 'Mom' as correct behavior. Per decisions-log and rewrite-wal/phase-14.json this is actually flagged as a potential bug (round-trip should preserve null). Test locks in the wrong behavior.
findings.suggested_fix: Either (a) promote to a regression test with a comment explaining why coercion is intentional, or (b) change fromJson to preserve null and update the default-resolution layer; re-target the test.

findings.issue: P0-6 (wrong-PIN threshold) is covered but ASSERTS WEAKLY in cross_feature_test: after crossing threshold it checks 'ws is not null' rather than asserting the engine is in distress chain or that messaging.calls fired. The 50ms delay + absence of contacts in the fixture make the chain advance silently.
findings.suggested_fix: Supply at least one contact in the fixture, then assert fx.messaging.calls is non-empty OR the underlying engine's isDistressChain==true after the async delay.

findings.issue: P0-7 incoming call pause test uses Future.delayed(10ms) instead of fakeAsync, which couples test timing to the test host's scheduler. Not deterministic.
findings.suggested_fix: Wrap these tests in fakeAsync and use async.elapse to drive the incoming-call subscription deterministically.

findings.issue: session_scenarios_test 'disguised reminder triggers notification on step start' never asserts a notification was shown — it only asserts stepStarted event count == 1. The FakeNotificationService does not expose a calls list.
findings.suggested_fix: Either add a showDisguisedReminder call list on FakeNotificationService (mirroring other fakes) or rename the test to match what it actually verifies.

findings.issue: P0-9 Layer 4 structural check for 'no flutter/services import' and 'no MethodChannel construction' is source-string grep. It does not catch transitive imports via other dart packages that do bring in MethodChannel.
findings.suggested_fix: Add an additional test that walks the transitive dependency graph of each simulation_*.dart file (e.g. via analyzer) to verify no transitive dependency on dart:ui platform message infrastructure.

findings.issue: Property suite (TEST-120) is smaller than the 200 iterations the test-strategy specifies, and only 15 of ~25 domain models are covered.
findings.suggested_fix: Add a parametrized round-trip test that enumerates every JSON-serializable model (AppSettings, UserProfile, AppDefaults, ModeOverrides, DistressChain, StealthConfig, GpsLoggingConfig, BatteryAlertConfig, SessionLog, ReminderTemplate, DisarmTrigger subtypes) with 200 randomized instances per type.

findings.issue: simulation_defense_test Layer 2 instantiates real AudioService/PhoneService/VibrationService. If a future refactor moves the isSimulation short-circuit below a MethodChannel call, the test will fail with MissingPluginException on CI rather than a clean assertion.
findings.suggested_fix: Add a comment on each Layer 2 test documenting the 'short-circuit before channel access' contract, or wrap with a test that explicitly registers a test MethodChannel handler that throws to enforce the invariant.

findings.issue: test/scenarios/ directory is absent (listed in the audit scope). Not a block — the content lives under test/integration/ — but the directory-name drift may confuse future agents following the test-strategy doc.
findings.suggested_fix: Either create an empty test/scenarios/ with a README pointing to test/integration/, or update docs/test-strategy.md to refer only to test/integration/.

open_questions: FakeCallConfig null-callerName coercion: is coercion to 'Mom' the intended spec or is it a bug flagged in phase-14 notes? The current property test locks the coercion in — decision needed before signing off.
Should a dedicated test/regression/settings_controller_test.dart be added, or is the session_controller L7 test sufficient to cover D-CONTROLLER-1?
Does the project intend to add P1 coverage for TEST-106/107/108 (mode switch / language change / contact deletion blocked during session)? Currently absent.
Layer 4 sim-defense uses file-string grep. Is a deeper transitive-import check desired, or is the human-readable source check considered adequate?
